summary: Tested Month-on-Month Comparison Table Editable Feature. All 18 features verified: Backend APIs (POST/DELETE override, GET comparison with flags) and Frontend UI (edit icons, edit mode, save, reset, cancel) working correctly.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing plan and resource from target-plans API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Editable Comparison Table feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/performance/comparison/override (saves manual_revenue or manual_outstanding), DELETE /api/performance/comparison/override (resets override), GET /api/performance/comparison (returns has_revenue_override, has_outstanding_override, auto_revenue, auto_outstanding flags). Frontend: ComparisonTable component at PerformanceTracker.js lines 562-671, EditableCompRow component at lines 674-741. Data-testids: edit-btn-revenue, edit-btn-outstanding, save-revenue, save-outstanding, cancel-revenue, cancel-outstanding, reset-revenue, reset-outstanding, edit-revenue-{month}-{year}, edit-outstanding-{month}-{year}, comp-row-revenue, comp-row-outstanding.

Comparison_Table_Actions_Column.details: Table renders with ACTIONS column header visible

Revenue_Row_Edit_Icon.details: Revenue row has pencil edit icon with data-testid='edit-btn-revenue'

Outstanding_Row_Edit_Icon.details: Outstanding row has pencil edit icon with data-testid='edit-btn-outstanding'

Non_Editable_Rows_No_Icons.details: Target, Achievement %, New Accounts, Existing Accounts, Pipeline Value, Pipeline Accounts, Visits, Calls rows have NO edit icons

Revenue_Edit_Mode_Inputs.details: Clicking Revenue pencil icon turns cells into editable inputs (3 inputs for 3 months)

Outstanding_Edit_Mode_Inputs.details: Clicking Outstanding pencil icon turns cells into editable inputs (3 inputs for 3 months)

Edit_Mode_Save_Cancel_Buttons.details: Edit mode shows Save (disk icon) and Cancel (X icon) buttons with data-testid='save-revenue/outstanding' and 'cancel-revenue/outstanding'

Save_Override_Via_POST.details: Entering values and clicking Save persists override via POST /api/performance/comparison/override

Override_Amber_Indicator.details: After save, row shows amber indicator dot (bg-amber-400) indicating manual override

Reset_Icon_Appears.details: After save, Reset icon (rotate arrow) appears with data-testid='reset-revenue/outstanding'

Reset_Clears_Override.details: Clicking Reset clears the override via DELETE /api/performance/comparison/override

Reset_Restores_Auto_Values.details: After reset, auto-computed values are restored (revenue_achieved equals auto_revenue)

Cancel_Exits_Without_Saving.details: Cancel button exits edit mode without saving changes

Backend_GET_Override_Flags.details: GET /api/performance/comparison returns has_revenue_override and has_outstanding_override flags

Backend_GET_Auto_Values.details: GET /api/performance/comparison returns auto_revenue and auto_outstanding original values for reset reference
